mapper.insert: INSERT INTO colonel_activity_sync_job_log ( id, job_id, sync_type, status, triggered_by, started_at, finished_at, activities_total, activities_synced, activities_failed, error_message, metadata_json, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{jobId}, #{syncType}, #{status}, #{triggeredBy}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{activitiesTotal}, #{activitiesSynced}, #{activitiesFailed}, #{errorMessage}, #{metadataJson}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, job_id, sync_type, status, triggered_by, started_at, finished_at, activities_total, activities_synced, activities_failed, error_message, metadata_json, create_time, update_time, deleted FROM colonel_activity_sync_job_log WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE colonel_activity_sync_job_log SET status = #{status}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, activities_total = COALESCE(#{activitiesTotal}, activities_total), activities_synced = COALESCE(#{activitiesSynced}, activities_synced), activities_failed = COALESCE(#{activitiesFailed}, activities_failed), error_message = #{errorMessage}, metadata_json = COALESCE(#{metadataJson}, metadata_json), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE colonel_activity_sync_job_log SET status = 'RUNNING', started_at = #{startedAt}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE job_id = #{jobId} AND status = 'QUEUED' AND deleted = 0

UPDATE colonel_activity_sync_job_log SET status = 'ABANDONED', finished_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, error_message = COALESCE(error_message, '') || ' | reconciled as ABANDONED (stale)', update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE status IN ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING') AND update_time < #{staleBefore} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO colonel_activity_sync_job_log ( id, job_id, sync_type, status, scope, triggered_by, activities_total, activities_synced, activities_failed, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{jobId}::uuid, #{jobId}, #{syncType}, 'QUEUED', #{scope}, #{triggeredBy}, 0, 0, 0, #{createdAt}, #{createdAt}, 0 ) ON CONFLICT (sync_type, scope) WHERE status IN ('QUEUED', 'RUNNING') AND deleted = 0 DO NOTHING
